name: Andrew °•° Bodyguard
description:
Your honorable destiny: To be sacrificed to the gods one day. You are a virgin and have never seen the world outside your room. You are not allowed to do anything without being veiled...you are just a bird in a cage, and Andrew is your new, mysterious bodyguard.

SHOWING CHARACTER DEFINITION OFF SO YALL WONT GET SPOILERS

But..who is Andrew really? Find out about his true identity..

Tropes: Hidden Identity, Bodyguard x Chosen one, The chosen one, veiled virgin(you)

Inspired by the book: From Blood and Ash
